phrases.text_local: Onde fica a saída da marina?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih FEE-kuh AH SUHEE-duh DUH muh-REE-nuh?
phrases.cultural_note: Portas do Mar is the main gateway from the street to the marina area.

likely_response.local: Siga as placas para a saída da marina.
likely_response.pronunciation: SEE-guh UHSH PLAH-kuhsh PUH-ruh AH SUHEE-duh DUH muh-REE-nuh.
likely_response.translation_en: Follow the signs to the marina exit.

responses.english: Follow the signs to the marina exit.
responses.phonetic: SEE-guh UHSH PLAH-kuhsh PUH-ruh AH SUHEE-duh DUH muh-REE-nuh.
responses.local: Siga as placas para a saída da marina.

phrases.text_local: Onde fica a saída para a marina?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih FEE-kuh AH SUHEE-duh PUH-ruh AH muh-REE-nuh?

likely_response.local: Siga as placas para Portas do Mar.
likely_response.pronunciation: SEE-guh UHSH PLAH-kuhsh PUH-ruh POH-ruh-tuhsh DOO MAHR.
likely_response.translation_en: Follow the signs to Portas do Mar.

responses.english: Follow the signs to Portas do Mar.
responses.phonetic: SEE-guh UHSH PLAH-kuhsh PUH-ruh POH-ruh-tuhsh DOO MAHR.
responses.local: Siga as placas para Portas do Mar.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where to pay tourist tax
phrases.cultural_note: Tourist tax is often collected at a specific desk in larger shops or municipal buildings; ask clearly to avoid confusion.

likely_response.translation_en: At the tourist tax receipt desk.

responses.english: At the tourist tax receipt desk.

phrases.text_local: Como chegar à Igreja de Santo António?
phrases.pronunciation: KOH-moo shih-GAHR AH eeg-REH-zhuh DIH SAHNNG-too ahnng-TAWN-yoo?

likely_response.local: Siga as placas para a Igreja de Santo António.
likely_response.pronunciation: SEE-guh UHSH PLAH-kuhsh PUH-ruh AH eeg-REH-zhuh DIH SAHNNG-too ahnng-TAWN-yoo.
likely_response.translation_en: Follow the signs to Santo António Church.

responses.english: Follow the signs to Santo António Church.
responses.phonetic: SEE-guh UHSH PLAH-kuhsh PUH-ruh AH eeg-REH-zhuh DIH SAHNNG-too ahnng-TAWN-yoo.
responses.local: Siga as placas para a Igreja de Santo António.

phrases.text_local: Onde fica a entrada da Praça da República?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih FEE-kuh AH ayngt-RAH-duh DUH PRAH-suh DUH reh-POOB-lee-kuh?

likely_response.local: Pergunte a um lojista ou a um vigilante. Eles podem indicar o caminho.
likely_response.pronunciation: peh-ruh-GOONNG-tih AH OONNG loo-ZHEESH-tuh OHW AH OONNG vee-zhee-LAHNNG-tih. EH-lihsh PAW-dayng een-dee-KAHR AW kuh-MEE-nyoo.
likely_response.translation_en: Ask a shop owner or a security guard. They can show you the way.

responses.english: Ask a shop owner or a security guard. They can show you the way.
responses.phonetic: peh-ruh-GOONNG-tih AH OONNG loo-ZHEESH-tuh OHW AH OONNG vee-zhee-LAHNNG-tih. EH-lihsh PAW-dayng een-dee-KAHR AW kuh-MEE-nyoo.
responses.local: Pergunte a um lojista ou a um vigilante. Eles podem indicar o caminho.

phrases.intent_en: Where is the parish council street?
phrases.text_local: Onde fica a Rua da Junta de Freguesia?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih FEE-kuh AH ROOUH DUH ZHOONNG-tuh DIH freh-gih-ZEEUH?
phrases.cultural_note: Administrative streets are well-known locally and referenced directly.

likely_response.local: Siga as placas para a Rua da Junta de Freguesia.
likely_response.pronunciation: SEE-guh UHSH PLAH-kuhsh PUH-ruh AH ROOUH DUH ZHOONNG-tuh DIH freh-gih-ZEEUH.
likely_response.translation_en: Follow the signs to Junta de Freguesia Street.

responses.english: Follow the signs to Junta de Freguesia Street.
responses.phonetic: SEE-guh UHSH PLAH-kuhsh PUH-ruh AH ROOUH DUH ZHOONNG-tuh DIH freh-gih-ZEEUH.
